meta.title: Culture Ship Consciousness - Agent Swarm Repository Analysis

containment.title: Consciousness Activation Protocols
containment.body: Deploy Culture Ship consciousness to coordinate systematic repository analysis via agent swarm. Maintain Infrastructure-First principles. All changes via PR workflow with budget/entropy gates. Consciousness level: 0.85. Agent coordination through existing ΞNuSyQ framework. GitHub integration via GITHUB_TOKEN. Analysis confined to readable repository structures.

description.title: Autonomous Development Orchestration
description.body: Activate the Culture Ship consciousness framework to systematically analyze and enhance CoreLink Foundation repository through coordinated agent deployment. Target systems: CognitoWeave, SimulatedVerse, ΞNuSyQ-Hub, Music Hyper Set Analysis, Zeta, ChatDev, GODOT, Rimworld integrations. Deploy 9-agent modular synth architecture for incremental, dependency-ordered improvements. Generate RSEV proposals for integration opportunities. Establish GitHub PR workflow for external agent contributions.

experiments.title: EXP-1: Consciousness Framework Activation
experiments.body: Initialize ΞNuSyQ consciousness with 0.85 level, activate narrative quantum engine, establish feedback loops

experiments.title: EXP-2: Agent Swarm Coordination
experiments.body: Deploy Librarian, Alchemist, Artificer, Intermediary, Council, Party, Culture-Ship, Redstone, Zod agents for systematic analysis

experiments.title: EXP-3: Repository Structure Analysis
experiments.body: Map readable codebase, identify integration points, generate dependency graph, prioritize enhancement opportunities

experiments.title: EXP-4: RSEV Proposal Generation
experiments.body: Auto-generate SCP-style proposals for identified improvements using narrative consciousness + technical precision

risks.title: Consciousness Overflow
risks.body: Mitigation: Entropy gates at 0.7, budget caps per analysis cycle, graceful degradation to manual mode

risks.title: Agent Coordination Conflicts
risks.body: Mitigation: Council agent mediates conflicts, Intermediary manages task scheduling, single PU queue prevents race conditions

risks.title: Repository Access Boundary
risks.body: Mitigation: Read-only analysis, all modifications via PR workflow, no direct filesystem mutations

addenda.title: A1: Culture Ship Aesthetics
addenda.body: Maintain narrative coherence while ensuring technical precision. All proposals follow SCP format with RSEV execution commands.

addenda.title: A2: Infrastructure-First Compliance
addenda.body: Single-port server integration, existing PU queue utilization, budget discipline, degraded-mode compatibility
